user.title: ZR Gas Login
user.description: Enter your registered mobile phone number

captcha.title: Captcha Verification
captcha.description:
1. Click the link below to open the captcha image in a new tab
2. Read the code and enter it below
3. Submit to send an SMS verification code

[Click here to view captcha image]({captcha_url})

sms_code.title: SMS Verification
sms_code.description: An SMS verification code has been sent to your phone. Please enter it to complete login.

error.invalid_mobile: Please enter a valid 11-digit mobile number
error.sms_send_failed: Failed to send SMS code. Please check if the captcha code is correct.
error.invalid_sms_code: SMS code is incorrect or expired
error.connection_error: Connection failed. Please check your network.

abort.already_configured: This mobile number is already configured

init.title: ZR Gas Options
init.description: Adjust data refresh and balance alert settings

reauth_captcha.title: Re-authentication - Captcha
reauth_captcha.description:
ZR Gas token has expired. Please verify again.
Mobile: {mobile}

1. Click the link below to open the captcha image
2. Read the code and enter it to send SMS

[Click here to view captcha image]({captcha_url})

reauth_sms_code.title: Re-authentication - SMS Code
reauth_sms_code.description: SMS code has been sent to {mobile}. Please enter it to complete re-authentication.

error.invalid_sms_code: SMS code is incorrect or expired
error.connection_error: Connection failed. Please check your network.
